build_system: Composer (cannot run composer install in sandbox - INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network)
test_framework: PHPUnit 11 (tests/ directory), but cannot run in sandbox without vendor/
build_command: php -l on all PHP files for syntax validation
test_command: php -l validation on all new/modified PHP and Blade files
verification_instructions: 1. Run php -l on every new PHP file. 2. Verify Blade views have balanced directives (@if/@endif, @foreach/@endforeach, etc). 3. Check route references are consistent.
setup_instructions: User runs composer install on their XAMPP. We just add code and update composer.json.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - cannot install packages, pull images, or make external HTTP calls. PHP 8.4 available for syntax checking only. No database available. No composer/artisan commands possible.
contribution_requirements: All PHP must pass php -l. Blade views must have balanced directives. Use existing patterns (Setting model for config, admin layout, card styles, btn-primary etc). Tailwind via CDN + Alpine.js for interactivity.
key_patterns: Settings stored via Setting::put(key, value, group) and retrieved via setting(key) helper or Setting::get(key). Admin views extend layouts.admin with @section('admin'). Public views extend layouts.app with @section('content'). Card class for containers. btn-primary/btn-ghost/btn-dark for buttons. Products use slug-based routing. Pages use slug-based routing (/p/{page}). Promotions managed through Settings model. Alpine.js x-data for JS interactivity.
directory_structure: app/Models/ - Eloquent models | app/Http/Controllers/ - public controllers | app/Http/Controllers/Admin/ - admin controllers | resources/views/ - Blade views (layouts/, admin/, dashboard/, products/, pages/, checkout/, partials/, components/) | routes/web.php - all routes | database/migrations/ - migration files | database/seeders/ - seeders | config/ - app config | public/ - web root
